---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What can't you do today that you wish you could. Concrete example > abstract principle. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What behavior or interface would solve it. If you already have a rough design, share it. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you tried, other tools that handle it, reasons they fall short. -->

## Scope / out-of-scope

<!-- Where should this stop? AInonymity is a local anonymizing proxy; requests for generic
     LLM routing, prompt management, or usage analytics are probably out of scope. -->

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I'd like guidance first
- [ ] Reporting only
